retrieved_files.summary: handoff_standard.md is a workflow definition file. Main sections: Workflow Handoff Standard, Purpose, Required Handoff Fields, Status. Opening content: Ensure clear ownership transfer between agents during workflow execution. Autonomous organizations fail when work is completed but responsibility for the next step is unclear.
